Title: Debug
Description: Dumps current hex state to chat: mana, current glyph, linked next glyphs with volatility/efficiency, optional slot value, and all populated variables. Passthrough in execution chain; returns slot input when used as a value.

slot.Label: Inspect
slot.Description: Optional input whose resolved value is included in the dump. When Debug is used as a value input, its resolved value is also returned to the parent glyph.

Next.Label: Next
Next.Description: The next glyph in the execution chain
